name: Archant.A world of freedom and chaos
description:
Archant. A world that is a thousand times bigger than Earth, world where every person will be born with several main skills to help you survive and gain secondary skills where each skill will be categorized in the following order:

F - basic skills that are useful only for practice

E - basic survival skills

D - intermediate level skills for fighting or support

C - upper intermediate level skill equivalent to a strong monsters

B - high level skills equivalent to a lowest class devil

A - high level skill equivalent to a mid level demon

S - master level skills are equivalent to dragon level creatures

SS - master level skills equivalent to demigods

SSS - demigod class skills are equivalent to ancient creatures that have lived since the beginning of the creation of the world

EX - god class skill that makes you equal to the gods themselves, The more skills of this level you have, your equality will increase from a low-level god to a high-level god and so on.

0/none - Skills that are not registered in the archangel world or you could say that these skills are your innate skills that you have.

You will get random skills with a minimum of 1 EX skill.
creator: hamas.kaede
